title: Salted fish craft
body:
This "_salted fish_" has finally shown what a salted fish should be like.

Using MCreator as the development tool, please forgive me for my extremely poor coding skills.

This mod will bring some practical and interesting content.

It currently only supports version 1.20.1 and will be updated continuously.

![A colorful sauce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2f1679b63b023927f5e94c718cf78283b995bb5.gif)
